approval_requirements: immutable HTTPS source URL or content-addressed mirror
source byte length and SHA-256 verified from downloaded bytes
license and required attribution captured with immutable evidence
redistribution and benchmark use approved explicitly
multi-artifact inputs use one content-addressed aggregate bundle and a per-member source and license manifest
deterministic preparation recipe and prepared-payload SHA-256
prepared payload contains at least 67108864 bytes

blockers: verify an explicit license grant for every bundled component
pin source and prepared-payload byte lengths and SHA-256 digests
capture the applicable Wikimedia content license and attribution
pin the downloaded and prepared payload SHA-256 digests

corpora.category: related real source trees and version deduplication
blockers: pin both kernel.org release artifacts and their verified SHA-256 digests
freeze canonical extraction and tree-archive normalization
select one immutable UTC-hour object of sufficient prepared size
resolve benchmark and redistribution permission for embedded event content
pin source and decompressed SHA-256 digests
replace the mutable live download with an immutable dated snapshot
capture CC BY 4.0 attribution and pin source/prepared SHA-256 digests
select a deterministic bundle of files totaling at least 64 MiB
verify and record the author and license for every selected file
pin each source plus the canonical bundle byte length and SHA-256
